title: ruehssia paganuccii
intro: Ruehssia paganuccii, also known as Rauvolfia, is a plant species in the Apocynaceae family, commonly found in tropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its alkaloids, which have been shown to have a sedative effect and help lower blood pressure. The health benefits of Ruehssia paganuccii include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting better sleep, and aiding in the treatment of hypertension and heart palpitations. Herbal preparations of Ruehssia paganuccii include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are often used in Ayurvedic and traditional Chinese medicine practices.
